# Blinky

> Blinky is a keyboard-first desktop utility for quickly accessing snippets, files, folders, URLs, and apps.

## Main Pages
- Home: https://blinky.onez.app/
- Search & Launch feature: https://blinky.onez.app/features/search-launch
- Open Library feature: https://blinky.onez.app/features/open-library
- Collections feature: https://blinky.onez.app/features/collections
- Dark Mode & Themes feature: https://blinky.onez.app/features/dark-mode-themes

## Product Summary
- Launch Blinky from any app with one hotkey.
- Fuzzy search across all saved items.
- Organize content with collections and metadata.
- Customize appearance with dark mode and accent themes.

## Contact
- Email: hi@onez.app

## Extended Index
- Full index: https://blinky.onez.app/llms-full.txt
